backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend for an AI trading app, managing portfolio positions, a watchlist, and a daily market briefing using in-memory maps with CRUD operations.
feature_evidence.json: JSON report mapping feature IDs (Market Dashboard, Watchlist, Portfolio Overview, AI Assistant) to their associated frontend files, components, and test IDs for build verification.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of three frontend source files: App.tsx, MarketBriefingCard.tsx, and AssistantChatHistory.tsx.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes including colors, borders, chart palettes, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app titled 'AI Trading Assistant App', mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with four routes (Dashboard, Watchlist, Portfolio, AIAssistant) wrapped in a persistent Layout component.
frontend/src/components/AddAssetDialog.t: Modal dialog component for adding a new asset (ticker + optional description) to the watchlist, with validation and loading state handling.
frontend/src/components/AddPositionDialo: Modal dialog component for adding a new portfolio position with fields for ticker, quantity, entry price, stop loss, and take profit, including input validation.
frontend/src/components/AssistantChatHis: Scrollable chat history component for the AI assistant that renders user and assistant message bubbles with formatted text, risk badges, and trade setup cards.
frontend/src/components/DrawdownAlertBan: Renders alert banners for sectors experiencing significant drawdowns, displaying the drawdown percentage and three predefined hedge/risk-management action cards.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the main app shell with a sidebar containing logo, live market indicator, navigation links, market status, and a footer attribution.
frontend/src/components/MacroEventsPanel: Displays a card listing upcoming and released macro economic events with expected vs. actual values, deviation percentages, and status badges.
frontend/src/components/MarketBriefingCa: Shows a daily market briefing card that renders formatted text (headers, bullet points) from a briefing string, with skeleton loading state and a fallback default briefing.
frontend/src/components/PortfolioSummary: Renders a four-card grid summarizing portfolio metrics including a circular health score gauge, total P&L, portfolio delta, and total value.
frontend/src/components/PositionRow.tsx: Renders a single table row for a portfolio position showing ticker, entry/current price, P&L, stop loss distance, take profit, and a remove button.
frontend/src/components/TradeSetupCard.t: Displays a structured trade setup card with entry, stop loss, and take profit levels, risk/reward ratio badge, optional pattern/timeframe labels, and a rationale description.
frontend/src/components/WatchlistAssetRo: Renders a single watchlist asset row displaying simulated price, percent change, trend, RSI badge, and sentiment badge, with a remove button and visual alerts for overbought/oversold conditions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including market briefing, watchlist, and portfolio positions using the ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a terminal-style dark theme with custom OKLCH color tokens for gain, loss, warning, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AIAssistant.tsx: AI Assistant page with three tabbed modes (Strategist, Risk Guard, Alpha Hunter) that accepts user queries and displays rule-based trading analysis responses in a chat interface.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page displaying a hero banner, overnight market moves grid, market briefing card, and macro events panel using mock data and React Query.
frontend/src/pages/Portfolio.tsx: Portfolio page that lists active positions in a table with P&L metrics, drawdown alerts, and dialogs for adding/removing positions via React Query mutations.
frontend/src/pages/Watchlist.tsx: Watchlist page showing tracked assets with price, RSI, trend, and sentiment columns, plus add/remove functionality via a dialog and React Query mutations.
frontend/src/utils/aiAssistantLogic.ts: Defines AI assistant response logic for three modes (strategist, guard, hunter), generating mock trade setups, market briefings, and risk assessments based on query parsing and simulated market data.
frontend/src/utils/mockMarketData.ts: Provides seeded pseudo-random simulated market data including prices, RSI, sentiment, trend, sector drawdowns, and static overnight moves for a fixed set of tickers.
frontend/src/utils/portfolioCalculations: Utility functions to enrich portfolio positions with current price, P&L, and stop-loss proximity, calculate aggregate portfolio health metrics, and identify sector drawdown alerts.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the trading app, extending the theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens (primary, sidebar, chart, gain/loss), custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), box shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state descriptor (version 3) for a trading web app with a market dashboard, watchlist, portfolio overview, and an AI assistant with three modes (Daily Strategist, Risk & Portfolio Guard, Alpha Hunter). Records existing features, schema version, and image requirements.
